overall.description: A cinematic shot from a video game depicting the interior of a grand gothic dining hall at night, illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Two robed figures stand in the foreground observing students seated at long dining tables, with large stained glass windows revealing a dark sky outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candles and long house tables

events.description: figure on the right raises arm in a gesturing motion toward the dining hall

agents.ego_description: standing at the entrance of the hall overlooking the dining students and floating candles

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing still, facing the hall
robed figure gesturing with right arm toward the dining area

entered.detail: thousands of lit candles floating in mid-air throughout the ceiling area, providing warm illumination
rows of long wooden dining tables filled with students and food
floor-to-ceiling arched stained glass windows showing dark night sky outside
upper level stone balcony with ornate railings along the left wall
massive stone fireplace with fire burning on the far left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view from behind two robed figures looking into a vast gothic dining hall. Thousands of floating candles illuminate the space from above, casting warm light on long dining tables filled with students. Tall stained glass windows on the right reveal a dark night sky, while a large fireplace burns on the left wall. One of the foreground figures gestures toward the scene around the 5-second mark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective from behind two robed figures as they overlook a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by a sea of floating lights. It begins with a wide view of the vast interior, where thousands of candles cast a warm, flickering glow over long tables crowded with students. As the camera lingers, the composition emphasizes the contrast between the burning fireplace on the left and the towering stained glass windows on the right that reveal a deep, dark night sky. The scene then shifts slightly in focus as one of the foreground figures gestures toward the bustling hall, drawing attention to the scale and magic of the environment.
